component.name: YogaBase
component.summary: Guided yoga sessions with voice, poses, and streak tracking

description.p: YogaBase is an offline yoga companion with voice-guided sessions, illustrated poses, and a daily streak to keep you moving. Pick a session category, choose your pace, and let the app take you through each pose.

ul.li: 25 guided session categories across beginner, intermediate, and advanced
48 illustrated yoga poses with English, Sanskrit, and translated names
Voice narration for every pose plus an intro countdown and mid-pose side switch
Three pacing modes: Swift, Balanced, and Endurance
Daily streak tracking that persists across sessions
Works fully offline — no account required
Available on Android, iOS, Desktop, and Web
